app.description: Pack files into a password-protected 7z archive and securely delete originals.
cli.create: Initialize a new 7z archive (with encrypted headers).
gui.ready_hint: Ready. Choose files, then click Pack.
gui.error.select_target_first: Please select a target 7z file first.
gui.error.select_files_first: Please select at least one file.
gui.error.no_valid_selected_files: No valid files in the selection.
gui.error.new_password_mismatch: New password and repeated password do not match.
gui.error.temp_dir_exists: Temp folder already exists and is not empty: {path}
gui.error.temp_dir_not_found: Expected temp folder does not exist: {path}
gui.error.seven_zip_env_hint: Please verify SEVEN_ZIP_EXE_PATH and SEVEN_ZIP_FM_PATH in your .env file.
gui.hint.no_pending_shred: No temporary files available to shred.
gui.checkshred.message:
All selected files were overwritten with random data.

Please verify contents if needed.

Before continuing: PERMANENTLY DELETE these files?

{preview}
gui.pack_done.message:
Files were added to the archive.
Next step: Shred temporary data.
gui.not_shredded.prompt:
There are still files that were not shredded.
Shred now?
gui.output.packed_ready_shred: {count} file(s) added to the archive. Ready to shred.
gui.output.started_7zfm:
7-Zip File Manager started. Password prompt happens there.
Archive: {path}
gui.output.repack_ok: New archive with new password created.
gui.output.rename_new: New archive moved to original name: {path}
gui.output.password_change_aborted_exist: Password change aborted: existing -old archive was kept.
Password change aborted: existing -new archive was kept.
